# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Web UI
- [ ] MQTT / Home Assistant Discovery
- [ ] Other

## Safety

- [ ] This change keeps the monitor read-only to the BMS.
- [ ] This change does not add BMS write/control commands.
- [ ] No secrets or private credentials are included.

## Testing

- [ ] Add-on starts successfully.
- [ ] MQTT connects.
- [ ] Home Assistant sensors update.
- [ ] Web UI opens.
- [ ] Test Telegram works, if relevant.
- [ ] Test MQTT works, if relevant.
- [ ] Logs checked for errors.

## Notes

Add any extra notes here.
